creator: lbartoletti@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 204266
pdal 1.9.0

Chagnes: https://github.com/PDAL/PDAL/releases/tag/1.9.0


For commiter and sunpoet: "PDAL no longer depends on the GEOS library. However, some polygon functions will not work if PDAL isn't built with a version of the GDAL library that has GEOS support." 

I left the dependency on GEOS in LIB_DEPENDS, however this will force me to modify GDAL to be able to have default options that can be used in our GIS ports with rainer@.
